- **Target Users:** [e.g. Remittance senders, Anchors, Admins]
- **Use Case:** [Describe the specific use case]
- **Value Add:** [What value does this provide?]

## Technical Considerations

<!-- If you have technical suggestions for implementation -->

### Component

<!-- Which component(s) would this affect? -->

- [ ] Frontend (Next.js)
- [ ] Backend API (Express.js)
- [ ] Oracle Service
- [ ] Smart Contract (Soroban)
- [ ] Database (PostgreSQL)
- [ ] Docker/Infrastructure
- [ ] Documentation

- [ ] No

- [ ] Yes (describe below)

## Examples & Mockups

<!-- If applicable, add examples, mockups, or screenshots -->

## Priority

<!-- How important is this feature? -->

- [ ] **Critical** - Blocks core functionality
- [ ] **High** - Significantly improves user experience
- [ ] **Medium** - Nice to have, would be useful
- [ ] **Low** - Minor improvement

## Checklist

<!-- Please confirm the following -->

- [ ] I have searched for existing feature requests and this is not a duplicate
- [ ] This feature aligns with RemitFlow's core mission (cross-border payments)
- [ ] I have provided sufficient context for the team to evaluate
- [ ] I'm willing to help implement this feature (optional)
